title: vicia unguiculata subsp. calcarata
intro: Vicia unguiculata subsp. calcarata, commonly known as cowhage or vegetable cowage, is a perennial vine belonging to the pea family (Fabaceae). This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly for its antispasmodic, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of cowhage include relief from menstrual cramps, indigestion, and other gastrointestinal issues, as well as potential anti-cancer properties. Cowhage is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and capsules, and can also be consumed as a vegetable in salads and stir-fries.
